name: apartment-manager
description: An apartment management system designed to use free-tier AWS services to manage apartments, tenants, and maintenance requests.
author: Craig R. Hughes <craig.git@rungie.com>

scripts.dev-console: sh -c 'if [ -z "$AWS_REGION" ]; then op run --env-file=.env.op -- bunx sst dev --mode=mono "$@"; else bunx sst dev --mode=mono  "$@"; fi' _
scripts.sst-dev: if [ -z "$AWS_REGION" ]; then op run --env-file=.env.op -- bunx sst dev; else bunx sst dev; fi
scripts.postversion: git commit -m "Bump package version to $npm_package_version" package.json; git flow release start $npm_package_version; git flow release finish -m $npm_package_version $npm_package_version; git checkout develop; git merge master
scripts.full-test: sh -c 'eslint --fix;tsc;if [ -z "$AWS_REGION" ]; then op run --env-file=.env.op -- bunx sst shell bun test "$@"; else bunx sst shell bun test "$@"; fi;bunx astro check' _
scripts.test: sh -c 'if [ -z "$AWS_REGION" ]; then op run --env-file=.env.op -- bunx sst shell -- bun test "$@"; else bunx sst shell -- bun test "$@"; fi' _
scripts.sst-diagnostics: sh -c 'if [ -z "$AWS_REGION" ]; then op run --env-file=.env.op -- bunx sst diagnostics --print-logs "$@"; else bunx sst diagnostics --print-logs "$@"; fi' _
scripts.gemini: op run --env-file=.env.op -- tmux -CC new -A -n Gemini -s apartment-manager-mcp-workspace bunx @google/gemini-cli@latest
